_example: Fill with {"file": "<path>", "reason": "<why>"}. Put spec/research files only — no code paths. Run `python3 .trellis/scripts/get_context.py --mode packages` to list available specs. Delete this line once real entries are added.

reason: 质量门：测试规模 / backend/results 边界 / 敏感配置 / commit 质量
API 响应 {code,message,data}；长任务节点错误翻译为 stop_reason
logger 名 / 占位符 / 错误日志规范
测试 DB 用法 + acceptance 必须显式 --database-url 不依赖 shell 残留
ADR §阶段 B 验收标准：等价输出、direct_candidates / decision_history / cve_candidate_artifacts 兼容、acceptance 场景结果不变
Plan B.4 强制要求：acceptance baseline 复跑 + compare 摘要写入 commit + high_value_path_regressed=false / patch_quality_degraded=false
技术决策沉淀（patch_type 命名空间 / distro 降权语义保持 / 等价契约清单）
PRD acceptance criteria 是 trellis-check 主要核对来源
